clusters.name: Verification
clusters.description: ZK proof of constituency, mDL credential verification, Cross-Device Bridge, browser-side proving. The substrate that enables agentic provenance, accountability receipts, and reader-side verifiability.
shipped_substrate: mDL Android OID4VP (HPKE + COSE_Sign1 + I1 SessionTranscript binding)
Three-tree ZK circuit (browser WASM via @voter-protocol/noir-prover)
Cross-Device Bridge (KV+SSE, HMAC, AES-256-GCM, 6 brutalist cycles)
Witness encryption (X25519 + BLAKE2b + XChaCha20-Poly1305)
858 Foundry tests on Scroll Sepolia
clusters.completion_target: Mainnet contracts + TEE deployment + tier honesty fixes

clusters.name: Reach
clusters.description: 24 boundary types per H3 cell, country-code-keyed protocol, $0 marginal district resolution. The capability that addresses the local-government void and 50,000-special-district gap no incumbent covers.
shipped_substrate: Shadow Atlas with 24 boundary types, 94,166 districts, R-tree <50ms p95
R2-chunked distribution via Atlas Worker
Country-code-keyed DistrictRegistry contract
Federal congress-legislators data ingested
clusters.completion_target: State + local + special district officeholder data; CA/GB/AU rep-lookup live; mainnet DistrictRegistry; multi-jurisdiction routing at campaign layer

clusters.name: Composability
clusters.description: Protocol-level identity portability, coalition aggregation, cross-border composition, cross-org reputation. The architectural feature app-layer competitors cannot retrofit.
shipped_substrate: Identity commitment as shared BN254 field element across orgs
Tree 3 engagement leaf is protocol-global
Verification packet as portable artifact with SHA-256 attestation hash
orgNetworks + orgNetworkMembers tables with full CRUD
clusters.completion_target: Coalition aggregation API (currently 501); cross-org reputation portability query; cross-border campaign schema; shared supporter pools; coalition packet computation

clusters.name: Agentic Systems
clusters.description: Agent-as-civic-actor with cryptographic provenance. The categorical differentiator: every incumbent ships AI for the org user; Commons ships AI for the constituent side with ZK proof attached.
shipped_substrate: 3-phase agentic DM resolution (role discovery → identity → contact hunting)
Message writer agent with grounding-verified composition
Subject line agent (Gemini structured output)
AI evaluator with 5-model panel + EIP-712 multi-model signatures
Delegation Convex CRUD complete (FEATURES.DELEGATION=false, no executor)
clusters.completion_target: Delegation executor running; per-supporter bill alerts; agentic legislative monitoring across 24 boundary types; agent-as-civic-actor pricing model

clusters.name: Quality Signaling
clusters.description: DebateMarket with LMSR + AI panel + EIP-712 signatures + position privacy ZK. Quality of reasoning, not just count. AI verdicts that are themselves verifiable.
shipped_substrate: DebateMarket contract on Sepolia (~6,550 LOC tests)
LMSR via PRB-math SD59x18
AI panel evaluation via @voter-protocol/ai-evaluator
Commit-reveal trade scheme with ZK debate-weight proofs
Stance positions with identity-commitment-keyed nullifier dedup
clusters.completion_target: Auto-debate-spawn from campaign threshold; on-chain stake verification production; mainnet DebateMarket; TEE-attested AI panel; debate→tier promotion

clusters.name: Accountability
clusters.description: Receipts with attestation hash, legislator scorecards, Merkle anchoring. Long-term-survivable artifacts that outlast the platform.
shipped_substrate: accountabilityReceipts schema with attestationDigest, packetDigest, proofWeight, responses[]
Legislator scorecards (90-day rolling responsiveness + alignment + composite, methodology versioned)
SnapshotAnchor contract live on Sepolia (anchors Shadow Atlas root, not yet receipt batches)
Receipt Merkle tree function (buildAnchorMerkleTree, no caller)
clusters.completion_target: Receipt Merkle anchoring pipeline; mainnet anchor; constituent-side receipt access; browser verification UI; state-bill ingestion for non-federal scorecards

clusters.name: Coordination Integrity
clusters.description: GDS, ALD, temporal entropy, burst velocity, CAI as mathematical anti-astroturf signals. Walker & Le (Socius 2023) peer-reviewed validation.
shipped_substrate: All 5 metrics implemented in src/lib/server/verification-packet.ts
Anti-astroturf signal surfacing (burst velocity > 5 → amber warning)
K-anonymity floors throughout
clusters.completion_target: Substrate honesty (reputationTier writer, engagementTier cross-check) so CAI inputs reflect real engagement; coordination integrity time series; engagement tier histogram rendered

clusters.name: Reader-side UX
clusters.description: Verification packet rendered for the staffer; /v/[hash] independent verification; reader dashboard. The category nobody else builds because every incumbent optimizes for the org buyer.
shipped_substrate: /v/[hash] page with anonymized summary (dateRange only)
Campaign report HTML template with attestation hash referenced to REPORT-ATTESTATION-SPEC v1
/accountability/[id] DM public profile
clusters.completion_target: Full staffer-legible packet on /v/[hash]; in-browser attestation verification UI; DM office profile + email domain verification; reader dashboard; CRM integration feed; weekly digest

clusters.name: Data Sovereignty
clusters.description: Owned Shadow Atlas at $0 marginal; PII-free architecture; outside the PE rollup cycle. Independence from the dying civic-data API layer (Google Civic, ProPublica, OpenSecrets, Congress.gov all dead).
shipped_substrate: Shadow Atlas owned in-house with 24 boundary types
PII-free architecture (eliminated 2026-04-10; _pii.ts removed)
Frozen voter-protocol/* domain strings
Independent of Cicero monopoly
clusters.completion_target: Mainnet contracts (Sepolia today); TIGER 2026 monitoring + DOGE/Census resilience plan
